_comment_prefixes: First half of a nemesis name (e.g. 'Rot', 'Bone'). Combined with a suffix to form names like 'Rotfang' or 'Bonecrusher' - YOU CAN MODIFY THIS LIST
_comment_suffixes: Second half of a nemesis name (e.g. 'fang', 'jaw'). Combined with a prefix to form names like 'Rotfang' or 'Bonecrusher' - YOU CAN MODIFY THIS LIST
_comment_titles: Flavor titles assigned at creation or rank change, by rank tier (rank0=Lesser to rank5=World Boss) - DO NOT MODIFY!!!

titles._comment: One title is picked randomly from the matching rank list each time a nemesis is created or changes rank

_comment_gloryTitles: Titles assigned after a VICTORY — when a nemesis wins a power struggle or kills a player. Replaces the current title  - DO NOT MODIFY!!!
_comment_shameTitles: Titles assigned after a DEFEAT — when a nemesis loses a power struggle or is killed by a player. Replaces the current title - DO NOT MODIFY!!!
